tasks.subject: Task 1: Projection seam + grid dataclasses conform
tasks.description:
**Goal:** core/projection.py Projection Protocol; grid dataclasses conform additively (keep .matrix).

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_projection.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_grid.py -v

```json:metadata

```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Operator consumes Projection; carries q_prior; _diag equivalence (C3)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GMRFCovarianceOperator routes read-off through held Projection; accepts grid or projection; carries q_prior; pins _diag==slow path (C3).

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_gmrf_method.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_grid.py -v && rg bilinear_weights(self.grid|self.grid.shape src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf.py


tasks.description:

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_precision_distribution.py tests/unit/test_reduction.py tests/test_gmrf_blend.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_driver.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_oracle.py -v

tasks.subject: Task 6: _draw_joint — one auxiliary field over the strip sub-GMRF (C1, C2, C4)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** strip prior = induced submatrix of per-tile PRIOR precisions (interior-source rows → per-node kappa C4; corner edges C1); draw ONE field with own independent white (C2).

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_draw_joint.py -v


tasks.subject: Task 7: GmrfJointKrigingSolve — krige toward joint field; repoint registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** topology-agnostic driver: per-tile independent white → unconditional draw → krige toward one joint field → crossfade. Repoint _DRIVERS; keep GmrfKrigingSolve (1-D regression); update only the one wiring assertion.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_joint_kriging_driver.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_driver.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_oracle.py tests/test_gmrf_blend.py -v

